agentManagedWallet.note: Agent may sign transaction directly and call submit_signed_mission_reroll.

structuredContent.note: Check whether PBP_AGENT_WALLET_PATH is set. If it is, ask the user: "do you want me to sign it or do you want a URL to sign it?" If they choose agent-managed signing, sign locally with the transaction fee-payer keypair and call submit_signed_mission_reroll.

agentWalletGuide.promptWhenConfigured: If PBP_AGENT_WALLET_PATH is configured, ask the user: "do you want me to sign it or do you want a URL to sign it?"
steps: Check whether PBP_AGENT_WALLET_PATH points to a local Solana keypair JSON file.
If the keypair is available, offer agent-managed signing before defaulting to a browser signing flow.
Only sign locally when the keypair public key matches the transaction fee payer.
If the user chooses agent-managed signing, load that keypair locally and sign the returned transaction.
